description: Complete ANC, intrapartum, and postnatal care vocabulary. Roots are CIEL's obstetric ConvSets covering obstetric history, antenatal assessments, delivery monitoring, postpartum care, and antenatal prophylaxis. These are globally standard WHO/CIEL obstetric concepts, not Kenya-specific.

notes.161009: Obstetric history detailed (ConvSet) — gravidity, parity, LMP, EDD, previous deliveries, complications (~158 concepts)
notes.163461: Monitoring after delivery (ConvSet) — postpartum maternal and newborn assessment including APGAR (~131 concepts)
notes.163391: Delivery assistant construct (ConvSet) — intrapartum monitoring, labour progress, delivery mode (~195 concepts)
notes.165347: Antenatal supplement/prophylaxis construct (ConvSet) — iron, folic acid, IPT, TT vaccination, vitamin A (~83 concepts)
notes.160767: Antenatal HIV test construct (ConvSet) — HIV testing, PMTCT, partner testing during ANC (~21 concepts)
